crew.subtitle: Build your team within budget

settings.subtitle: Adjust language, audio and visual quality
settings.resetConfirm: All local progress will be deleted.
build.label: Build
nation.de.name: Germany
nation.uk.name: United Kingdom
nation.us.name: United States
crew.bio.otto: Disciplined veteran, ideal to keep the bridge calm.
crew.bio.emil: Specialist in echo and propeller noise across the North Atlantic.
crew.bio.franz: Solves failures under pressure with rare efficiency.
crew.bio.karl: Reduces route drift and improves patrol handling.
crew.bio.arthur: Methodical British officer, cold under fire.
crew.bio.thomas: Experienced lookout who spots convoys early.
crew.bio.hugh: Mechanic with strong damage control in rough seas.
crew.bio.edward: Chart and route reader, excellent for infiltration.
crew.bio.richard: Steady officer who boosts crew response.
crew.bio.james: Alert sonar specialist, great against submerged contacts.
crew.bio.luke: Repairs fast and stabilizes stressed engines.
mission.m1.title: Patrol Training
mission.m1.summary: Leave port, hold safe depth and locate friendly or enemy traffic.
mission.m2.title: North Sea Hunt
mission.m2.summary: Follow sonar signals and practice silent approach.
mission.m3.title: Intercept HX Convoy
mission.m3.summary: Pick a merchant target before the destroyer detects your wake.
mission.m4.title: Blockade Operation
mission.m4.summary: Advanced mission with multiple contacts and a tense return.
mission.m5.title: Sandbox Patrol
mission.m5.summary: Free mode with systems preparation, ideal for testing future mechanics.
briefing.title: Briefing
briefing.subtitle: Plan the mission before deployment
briefing.objectiveSilent: Keep a low acoustic signature until the strike point.
briefing.objectiveStrike: Select the convoy's most valuable target.
upgrade.hull_steel_1.name: Reinforced steel I
upgrade.hull_steel_1.desc: Improves depth tolerance and structural silence.
upgrade.battery_silent_1.name: Silent batteries I
upgrade.engine_tuned_1.name: Tuned engine I
upgrade.sonar_array_1.name: Sonar array I
upgrade.torpedo_rack_1.name: Torpedo rack I
gameplay.title: Combat Room
gameplay.subtitle: Live navigation and attack systems
gameplay.hint: Line up the merchant in the periscope and fire a torpedo.
gameplay.hintTooDeep: Periscope unavailable at this depth. Rise to 20m or less.
gameplay.hintSuccess: Target neutralized. Return and complete the mission.
gameplay.hintMiss: Torpedo missed. Reposition and try again.
gameplay.hintEscortAlert: Escort alerted. Prepare the shot and pull back.
gameplay.hintEscortHunt: Destroyer hunting. Slow down and dive deeper.
